model.provider_desc: Select the base Artificial Intelligence engine.
model.model_desc: The specific variant or version of the selected engine.
model.system_prompt_desc: Defines the personality, rules, and core behavior of the assistant.
model.initial_msg_desc: The first thing the assistant will say when the call connects.
model.start_mode_desc: Who initiates the interaction when the call is answered?
model.response_length_desc: Adjusts how extensive or concise the assistant's replies will be.
model.tone_desc: Controls the emotional attitude of the assistant.
model.formality_desc: Adjusts the respect and linguistic formalism used.
model.pacing_desc: Controls latency and how quickly the agent assumes you finished speaking.
model.context_window_desc: How many previous messages the assistant will remember (1-50). Higher number = better memory but more token consumption.
model.frequency_penalty_desc: Prevents repeating the same words. 0 = no penalty, 2 = max penalty.
model.presence_penalty_desc: Encourages introducing new topics. 0 = no penalty, 2 = max diversity.
model.tool_strategy_desc: Controls when the assistant can use tools (transfer call, book appointment, etc).
model.max_tokens_desc: Hard limit on the maximum response length in tokens.
model.dynamic_vars_desc: Injects custom variables into the prompt in JSON format.
model.blacklist_placeholder: Banned words or phrases separated by comma...
model.blacklist_desc: The assistant will avoid generating these words (Stop Sequences).
model.hangup_enabled: Allow AI to hang up the call
model.hangup_enabled_desc: The Agent will use a secret tool to cut the call when saying goodbye or if necessary.
model.hangup_instructions_placeholder: Ex: If the client says they have no time, say 'Thanks for your time, have a great day' and hang up. Never beg.
model.hangup_instructions_desc: Trains the Agent indicating under which client behaviors or evasions it has permission to hang up.
model.hangup_keywords_placeholder: goodbye, bye, see you, not interested
model.hangup_keywords_desc: (Optional) If the AI pronounces these phrases at the end of its turn, the system will abruptly close the session. Separate with commas.

voice.title: Voice Configuration (TTS)
voice.language_desc: The Agent dictates the general language.
voice.norm_desc: Instructs the voice engine on how to process text or symbols before speaking them.
voice.latency_desc: Affects audio quality vs response speed.
voice.similarity_desc: Higher = More faithful to original voice.
